subject: [VID] Add internal port to match mariadb template
commit_message:
[VID] Add internal port to match mariadb template

According to the definition of (common.mariadbPort) under _mariadb.tpl
we need to add the mapping of (.Values "mariadb-galera" "service"
"internalPort") for the case of local installation

Issue-ID: OOM-2738
Signed-off-by: Mahmoud Abdelhamid <mahmoud.abdelhamid@orange.com>
Change-Id: I93e64e63a9c0e51c3ac101363b2e3c80238e2164

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

This is defiantly not the proper way of fixing this issue.

@Sylvain
It looks that your commit 93a5b49185695a7960ada82f5899265b5bc2e504 "[COMMON][MARIADB] Upgrade Mariadb DB galera version" removed the internal port value and replaced it with hardcoded config file. Was it intentional?

Patch Set 1:

yes it was intentional but I understand now it have unseen consequences
We can either:
- readd it with yaml anchor in mariadb-galera/values.yaml
- make the commonMariadbPort script find the value in the array

I would prefer first one as nobody will change the value and it takes less compute time

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> yes it was intentional but I understand now it have unseen consequences
> We can either:
> - readd it with yaml anchor in mariadb-galera/values.yaml
> - make the commonMariadbPort script find the value in the array
> 
> I would prefer first one as nobody will change the value and it takes less compute time

I'd also vote for doing it internally within maraidb-galera but I'm not sure if hooks will work in this case. You may need to tpl the config but you can give it a try;)
